title: Password Logbook
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
Stop emailing yourself your own passwords.

This 117-page password logbook is the offline, hack-proof, mom-can-actually-use-it solution to digital chaos. No subscription. No account to recover. Just an alphabetized book that stays exactly where you put it.

Who it's for:
- Adults overwhelmed by 100+ online accounts
- Seniors and parents who don't trust password managers
- Small-business owners juggling vendor logins
- Anyone who keeps clicking "Forgot Password?" three times a week

What's inside:
- A-to-Z tabbed sections so finding "Netflix" takes two seconds
- Structured fields per entry: website, username, password, security questions, recovery email, notes
- Multiple entries per letter - real-world capacity, not 5-account toy size
- Wi-Fi network and modem reset reference page
- Software license, subscription, and renewal tracker
- Emergency-info page so a trusted person can step in if needed

Compact 6x9 size. Soft, durable cover. Looks like a journal so it doesn't scream "my passwords are inside." Keep it in a desk drawer, not a laptop bag.

Get yours and stop the password panic - today.
